task.title: Saving a TSO session
task.shortdesc: You save TSO sessions to retrieve your output later or take advantage of more editing features, such as Compare (to compare multiple outputs) or Print.

steps.stepsection: To save your TSO session, follow these steps:

cmd.xref: Issue a TSO command from the TSO command shell.

step.cmd: Repeat the previous step for as many commands as you want to enter.
From the menu in the TSO command shell, select Export Shell Output.
step.stepresult: A window opens, prompting you to choose the location on which to save the output on your workstation. A default file name that you can change is provided.

step.cmd: After you specify the location and file name, click OK.
step.stepresult: The session output is saved in the TSO Commands node of the remote system in the Remote Systems view.

taskbody.postreq: To open a saved session and work with the output, double-click the session name that is listed under TSO Commands. You can print the session or select multiple saved sessions to compare the outputs of each.
